scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @audity/shared && npm run build --workspace @audity/api && npm run build --workspace @audity/worker && npm run build --workspace @audity/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @audity/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @audity/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @audity/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @audity/web
